pageList.description:
Pages from different groups are separated by commas in their slugs.
For example,
For an experiment with two groups, use => slug-a,slug-b
For an experiment with three groups, use => slug-a,slug-b,slug-c

folder.description: to write the pages in which folder, if in root page, then don't need write, to ensure pages in a same test should be in a same folder

link.description: link of the page this banner links to, eg: /sale?category[0]=living-room

published_at.description: will show up after the date & time

ended_at.description: will disappear after the date & time

src.description: url of the image hosted on cloudinary

permalink.description: permalink of the variant collection in Solidus

please use url not use Internal Url
eg: /products/seb-extendable-dining-table

before_date.description: Set a before date, all dates earlier than this date will be disabled.

after_date.description: Set an after date, all dates later than this date will be disabled.

disabled_date_range.description:
Set a disabled date range collection.
(all dates between start and end will be disabled)

disabled_dates.description:
Set some dates that are expected to be disabled. 
(there is no regularity between these dates. If you want to set a disabled date range, please use 'Disabled Date Range')

mapping.description: Used to place all the test variations.

options.name: phone
options.value: Please provide a valid phone number.
This field contains more than 8 character,contains 0-9a-zA-Z
options.name: password

options.value: Please select or enter the correct Date.
options.name: date

options.value: Please enter a valid email address.
options.name: email

variants.description: variant ids of tagged products. eg: 1, 23, 34

Please remember 
- config the img title , because it as GTM tracking event label
- use cloudinary

name.description: link name that customers can see directly

pinned.description: pinned on top without a close button

title.description: Title shown on banner or shown as link

banner_background_image.description: Banner shown on subscription popup for desktop, 400*450

banner_background_image_mobile.description: Banner shown on subscription popup mobile, 650 * 335

action_text.description: the text for users to click, eg: 'View Detail'

published_at.description: will show up after the date & time

ended_at.description: will disappear after the date & time

countdown_background_gradient.description: background gradient of Countdown, default is "linear-gradient(to bottom, #334f6e 50%, #23364b 50%)", #334f6e is the color of upper half, #23364b is the color of lower half

components.name: Optional Block
components.description: For the storyblok block add optional display

banner_desktop_image.description: This is for a defferent banner style, which text is contained in banner image. If you choose this style, 'banner_title', 'banner_intro', and 'banner_background_image' should be left blank.（The height to width aspect ratio should be 0.38)

banner_mobile_image.description: This is for a defferent banner style, which text is contained in banner image. If you choose this style, 'banner_title', 'banner_intro', and 'banner_background_image' should be left blank.（The height to width aspect ratio should be 0.38)

timer.description: Used to fill in the effective date and expiration date of the page (optional)

meta.description: Used to supplement the SEO-related information of the page.

body.description: Used to supplement the page content.

outdated_urls.description:
eg: /sofas-sale
If the "Outdated Urls" is set, when customers land on this outdated urls they will be redirected(301) to the "Path". 
It supports multiple urls, separated by ","

path.description: short url of the page, eg: /sale

query_deliver_before.description: if you want a 'delivery before xxx' page, use this field instead of 'Query'

permalink.description: You can find this in Knight, once set, the page will render as a normal category page, which means no category filters

description.description: used in meta tag for SEO

keywords.description: used in meta tag for SEO

banner_sub_title.description: sub title shown on mobile banner

banner_background_image_mobile.description: The height to width aspect ratio should be 0.38.

banner_desktop_image.description: This is for a defferent banner style, which text is contained in banner image. If you choose this style, 'banner_title', 'banner_intro', and 'banner_background_image' should be left blank

banner_mobile_image.description: This is for a different banner style, which text is contained in banner image. If you choose this style, 'banner_title', 'banner_intro', and 'banner_background_image' should be left blank. （The height to width aspect ratio should be 0.38)

countdown_color.description: Color of the countdown, default white

ended_at.description: time to retire this sale page

type.description: Dropdown component type, supports single/multiple selection

group_name.description: used to describe DY group name(optional)

cta_link_type.description:
Custom:读取STL level配置的链接信息 
default: 跳转到STL主页

background_image.description:
Please provide a 750x1334 image.
(Image stored at Cloudinary https://bit.ly/2Z2fhqo)

isAlertUser.description: If set to true, a pop-up will alert the user.

media.description: How to set a poster for a video? You can modify the link and add the parameter /so_{seconds} after /upload to add a poster to the video, such as https://res.cloudinary.com/castlery/video/upload/so_3/v1729760776/PLA%20-%20UAT/Dawson%20Storage%20Bed/-cd8c-4bfe-b020-5862ea0c5594.mp4

How to set a poster for a video?  can modify the link and add the parameter /so_{seconds} after /upload to add a poster to the video, such as https://res.cloudinary.com/castlery/video/upload/so_3/v1729760776/PLA%20-%20UAT/Dawson%20Storage%20Bed/-cd8c-4bfe-b020-5862ea0c5594.mp4
